case_title: LU DONG JIANG VS. SIYUAN MIAOLIN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, LU DONG AS TO DEFENDANT MIAOLIN, SIYUAN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIANG, LU DONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIAOLIN, SIYUAN AN INDIVIDUAL $6,465.67 PRINCIPAL, $20.61 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,639.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
